CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: RAYMOND WONG; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Motion And Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-20-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Attorney Vivian Lerche telephone number 415-680-5731 specially appearing for Plaintiff Cach, LLC.
Defendant Drew Henwood telephone number 408-279-2730 in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that no opposition was filed and that there is no motion to continue the matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC'S Motion for Entry of Judgment is granted. No opposition filed. The prevailing party is to provide a form of order.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)
